MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Lee, Esq. (415-957-1900 ext. 105) for Defendant/Moving party.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the reasons for the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARIE RIOS and 445 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-545140, CGC-15-546488, CGC-15-547336, CGC-15-547421, CGC-15-548937 WITH CASE CGC-15-544094 is DENIED. Individual factual issues predominate. Consolidation will not result in judicial economy and will be confusing to the jury. Consolidation is prejudicial to Plaintiffs.
